---
title: "Data Profile"
format: dashboard
server: shiny
theme: sandstone
---

```{r}
#| context: setup

Sys.setenv(`_R_USE_PIPEBIND_` = TRUE)
library(targets)
library(RSQLite)
library(bslib)
library(bsicons)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggridges)
library(ggradar)
library(viridis)
library(data.tree)

#devtools::install_github("ricardo-bion/ggradar", dependencies = TRUE)

tar_load(dps_client_files)
tar_load(dps_db_file)

dps_db_file <- paste0(dps_db_file, ".sqlite")

con <- dbConnect(SQLite(), dps_db_file)

dataset <- dbReadTable(con, "dataset")
datafiles <- dbReadTable(con, "datafiles")
profile_field <- dbReadTable(con, "profile_field")
profile_table <- dbReadTable(con, "profile_table")
dbDisconnect(con)

df <- dataset |>
  dplyr::filter(data_type == "data") |>
  dplyr::mutate(file_name = basename(file_path)) |>
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("id","file_path","file_name","file_ext","file_size",
                         "data_type","file_set","duplicated","include")))
df$n <- 1:nrow(df)
df <- merge(df, datafiles, by="id") |>
  dplyr::filter(type != "unknwn")

x <- c("accessibility", "completeness", "complexity", "consistency",
       "metadata", "skewness", "uniqueness", "usability")
x <- apply(df[, x], 1, mean, na.rm=TRUE)
df$score <- x
```

```{css}
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-value-box .value-box-title {
    font-size: clamp(0.1em, 5cqw, 0.8em) !important;
}
.quarto-dashboard .bslib-value-box .value-box-value {
    font-size: clamp(0.5em, 8cqw, 1.4em) !important;
}
```
